case_title: IRENE M. LIEBERMAN DBA THE MONROE vs. MILNE, WARREN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF IRENE M. LIEBERMAN DBA THE MONROE
